Content: This Google Sheet controls ALL content on your portfolio website. Changes you make here will appear on your site within 5 minutes (or instantly if you click Refresh Now button).
Updates: Hero section (name, title, bio, contact info) | How often to edit: Rarely (only when contact info changes)
Updates: Featured Projects section | How often to edit: Monthly (when you complete new projects) | Add rows to add more projects
Updates: Work Experience section | How often to edit: When you change jobs or get promotions | Add rows to add more positions
Updates: Skills & Expertise section | How often to edit: When you learn new skills/tools | Add rows to add more skills
Updates: Education section | How often to edit: Rarely (only for new degrees/certifications) | Add rows for additional education
Helper tab to organize all your image/video/audio URLs | Not directly used by website - just for your reference

STEP 1: Upload to Google Drive or ImgBB.com | STEP 2: Right-click → Share → Anyone with link → Copy link | STEP 3: Paste in Screenshot_URLs column | FORMAT: url1 | url2 | url3 (separate multiple with | pipe symbol)
STEP 1: Upload to YouTube (recommended) | STEP 2: Set privacy to Public or Unlisted | STEP 3: Copy share link | STEP 4: Paste in Video_URLs column
STEP 1: Upload to Google Drive or SoundCloud | STEP 2: Get public link | STEP 3: Paste in Audio_URLs column | STEP 4: Add title in Audio_Titles column
1. Go to PROJECTS tab | 2. Copy last row | 3. Paste below | 4. Change ID to next number | 5. Update all fields | 6. Upload media first | 7. Paste URLs | 8. Set Status to Active | 9. Save
Use | (pipe symbol) to separate: | Images: url1 | url2 | url3 | Technologies: React | Node | MongoDB | Captions: Caption 1 | Caption 2 | Caption 3
